nasb.text: And a man who had been lame from his mother’s womb was being carried along, whom they used to set down every day at the gate of the temple which is called Beautiful, in order to beg alms of those who were entering the temple.

esv.text: And a man lame from birth was being carried, whom they laid daily at the gate of the temple that is called the Beautiful Gate to ask alms of those entering the temple.

cnv.text: 有一個生來瘸腿的人被人抬來。他們天天把他放在那名叫美門的殿門口，讓他好向進殿的人討飯。

ccb.text: 有一个生来瘸腿的人天天被人抬到圣殿美门的外面，向进殿的人乞讨。

csbs.text: 一个生来瘸腿的被人抬来。他天天被放在那叫“美门”的圣殿门口，为要向进圣殿的人乞讨。
